headline: The Kraft Heinz Company's Taste Elevation: Can It Fuel Growth?

headline: Kraft Heinz Announces Departure of Senior Executive Cory Onell (KHC)
summary: The Kraft Heinz Company (NASDAQ:KHC) said Cory Onell will step down from his position as Executive Vice President and Chief Omnichannel Sales and Asia Emerging Markets Officer at the end of June, marking a leadership change within the food and beverage group. The company said Onell’s departure will become effective on June 30, 2026.

headline: Kraft Heinz Announces New Global Operating Structure to Accelerate Growth
summary: PITTSBURGH & CHICAGO, June 18, 2026--The Kraft Heinz Company ("Kraft Heinz") (Nasdaq: KHC) today announced changes to its global operating structure to help accelerate growth, sharpen focus, and more effectively deploy resources across its portfolio of iconic brands.

headline: Kraft Heinz overhauls operating structure to accelerate growth
summary: The Kool-Aid maker is reorganizing into three units and cutting senior leadership in a bid to turn around declining sales.

headline: Hershey, The Marzetti Company, and Simply Good Foods Stocks Trade Down, What You Need To Know
summary: A number of stocks fell in the afternoon session after the Federal Reserve held its benchmark rate at 3.5%–3.75% and delivered a dot plot pointing toward a potential hike. Packaged food companies are held precisely because of their bond-like qualities: predictable earnings and steady dividends in uncertain markets.
